User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Internal + API surfaces — not useful to index
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /_next/
Disallow: /desktop/
Disallow: /decentralization/
Disallow: /about/
Disallow: /donate/

# Heavy auto-generated media routes — let Kubo serve these directly
Disallow: /ipfs/

Sitemap: https://foundation.agorix.io/sitemap.xml
